# גלגל המזל משודרג — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> An upgraded, feature-rich Wheel of Fortune interactive tool. The user wants a highly enhanced spinning wheel experience, likely with advanced animations, customization options, and engaging visual effects that go beyond a basic spinner.

## How to Contact Us

- Address: הרב ישעיהו משורר 21

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About גלגל המזל משודרג
An upgraded, feature-rich Wheel of Fortune interactive tool. The user wants a highly enhanced spinning wheel experience, likely with advanced animations, customization options, and engaging visual effects that go beyond a basic spinner.

## Services/Products
- גלגל מזל אינטראקטיבי

## Target Audience
- מארגני אירועים
- מוסדות חינוך

## Industry
Interactive Web Tool / Game
